description_long: A young adult female figure is depicted with a stylized, semi-realistic appearance, featuring a fitted strapless bodice and a flared, layered skirt with a glossy finish. The outfit includes matching arm cuffs and high platform shoes, all coordinated in a striking, uniform color. Her arms are extended horizontally, and her hands are open, suggesting a neutral, balanced pose. The figure's long, straight hair falls down her back, partially covering her face and shoulders. The overall look is reminiscent of a fashionable, modern urban character, possibly inspired by pop culture or performance attire. The materials and finish give the figure a polished, almost synthetic look, suitable for digital or entertainment environments.
description: A stylized young woman in a strapless dress with a flared skirt, arm cuffs, and high platform shoes, standing with arms outstretched. The figure has long straight hair and a glossy, polished appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the strapless bodice, flared skirt, arm cuffs, and platform shoes, with arms extended and hair partially covering the face.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the bodice, the layered skirt, and the straight fall of the hair down the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full length of the hair, the back of the dress, and the symmetry of the arm and leg positions.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side profile of the outfit and the figure's stance.
attribute_clothing_type: strapless fitted dress with flared skirt, matching arm cuffs, and high platform shoes
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
